title: Notification dated 20.04.2017 under DMC Act, 1957
text: MOST URGENT GOVERNMENT OF NATIONAL CAPITAL TERRITORY OF DELHI DEPARTMENT OF URBAN DEVELOPMENT 10th LEVEL, C WING, DELHI SECRETARIAT, NEW DELHI-110 002 Phone-23392253 / 12 & Fax-23392858 F . N o . 7 ( 4 4 3 ) ( l ) / 2 0 0 4 / U D / V o l . - 9 / £ ^ / T M 1 P < \ Dt.:20-04-2012 To, The Deputy Secretary General Administration Department Govt, of NCT of Delhi Delhi Sectt., New Delhi Sub.: Publication of Notification regarding alterations with regard to the a r e a s of certain Zones by adjustment of Wards a s specified in the Fourteenth Schedule of DMC Act, 1957 as amended by the DMC (Amendment) Act, 2011 Sir, Kindly find enclosed herewith notification n u m b e r F.No.7(443)(l)/2004/UD/Vol.-II/521 dt.20th A p r i i ; 2 0 1 2 regarding alterations with regard to the areas of/certain Zones by adjustment of Wards as specified in the Fourteenth Schedule of DMC |Act, 1957 a s amended by the DMC (Amendment) Act, 2 0 1 1 , for immediate publishing in Delhi Gazette Extra Ordinary. It is requested to provide 25 copies of the said notification immediately after publication on MOST URGENT basis. Yours faithfully, E n d . : As above /1V (VIAM ^OJ^ ( A.V. PREM NATH ) JOINT SECRETARY (MB) (UD) -- 1 of 3 -- (TO BE PUBLISHED IN PART-IV OF THE DELHI GAZETTE-EXTRAORDINARY) GOVERNMENT OF NATIONAL CAPITAL TERRITORY OF DELHI DEPARTMENT OF URBAN DEVELOPMENT 9th LEVEL, C-WING, DELHI SECRETARIAT, NEW DELHI F.No.7(443)(l)/2004/UD/Vol.-II/5X| Dated:.. ZP.:°H.: 2012 NOTIFICATION F.No.7(443)(l)/2004/UD/Vol.-II/ In exercise of the powers conferred by section 3 A of the Delhi Municipal Corporation Act, 1957 (66 of 1957) as amended by the Delhi Municipal Corporation (Amendment) Act, 2011, the Government of National Capital Territory of Delhi hereby makes the following alterations with regard to the areas of certain Zones by adjustment of Wards as specified in the Fourteenth Schedule as follows: - SI.
